tooltips.mergingScript: Configure how source record data is transformed and mapped to the target record.

exceptions.sourceEntityCannotBeContributorOrChangeR: Entity '%s' is a contributor or change request derivative and cannot be used as a source entity.
exceptions.sourceEntityTypeNotAllowed: Entity '%s' cannot be used as a source entity: only Base and Hierarchy types are allowed.
exceptions.targetEntityCannotBePrimaryOfContributor: Entity '%s' is the primary entity of a contributor derivative and cannot be used as a target entity.
exceptions.sourceAndTargetEntityCannotBeSame: Source Entity and Target Entity cannot be the same.
exceptions.dataPipelineAlreadyExists: A data pipeline for this pair of entities already exists.
